mapper.select: SELECT p.PROJECT_ID ,u.USER_ID ,u.USER_NAME ,p.ROLE_ID FROM PROJECT_MEMBER p INNER JOIN TEAM_MEMBER t ON p.TEAM_MEMBER_ID = t.TEAM_MEMBER_ID INNER JOIN USERS u ON t.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE p.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}

SELECT a.milestone_id, a.version_id, a.title, a.description, a.manager_id, b.user_name AS managerName, a.status_code, a.status_name, a.start_date, a.end_date, v.version_name, a.created_at, NVL(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(PROGRESS_RATE)) FROM ISSUE WHERE MILESTONE_ID = a.MILESTONE_ID ), 0) AS totalProgressRate FROM milestone a LEFT JOIN PROJECT_VERSION v ON a.VERSION_ID = v.VERSION_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN users b ON a.manager_id = b.user_id WHERE a.milestone_id = #{milestoneId}

SELECT M.MILESTONE_ID, M.TITLE AS MILESTONE_TITLE, M.START_DATE, M.END_DATE, M.STATUS_CODE, V.VERSION_ID, V.VERSION_NAME, U.USER_NAME AS MANAGER_NAME,
NVL((SELECT ROUND(AVG(PROGRESS_RATE)) FROM ISSUE WHERE MILESTONE_ID = M.MILESTONE_ID), 0) AS TOTAL_PROGRESS_RATE,
-- 하위 일감 정보 I.ISSUE_ID, I.TITLE AS ISSUE_TITLE, I.PROGRESS_RATE AS ISSUE_PROGRESS_RATE, I.DUE_DATE, G.STATUS_NAME AS ISSUE_STATUS_NAME, U2.USER_NAME AS ASSIGNEE_NAME
FROM MILESTONE M LEFT OUTER JOIN PROJECT_VERSION V ON M.VERSION_ID = V.VERSION_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN USERS U ON M.MANAGER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ISSUE I ON M.MILESTONE_ID = I.MILESTONE_ID -- 여기서부터 하위 일감 관련 조인 추가 LEFT OUTER JOIN ISSUE_STATUS G ON I.ISSUE_STATUS_ID = G.ISSUE_STATUS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN USERS U2 ON I.ASSIGNEE_ID = U2.USER_ID
WHERE M.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY M.START_DATE DESC, I.ISSUE_ID ASC

SELECT i.issue_id ,i.title ,i.version_id ,i.progress_rate ,u.user_name AS assigneeName ,v.version_name ,g.status_name AS issueStatusName FROM ISSUE i LEFT JOIN PROJECT_VERSION v ON i.VERSION_ID = v.VERSION_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE_STATUS g ON i.ISSUE_STATUS_ID = g.ISSUE_STATUS_ID LEFT JOIN USERS u ON i.ASSIGNEE_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE i.MILESTONE_ID = #{milestoneId}
